home.header_subtitle: Switch-first launcher for live, local and test playback
home.summary: Bootstrap is complete. This screen now acts as the product hub that routes every media source into one shared playback experience.

build_health.title: Build health
build_health.detail: Desktop and Switch builds are green, including .nro output

current_focus.title: Current focus
current_focus.detail: Promote Playback Test into the first real player screen

primary_promise.title: Primary promise
primary_promise.detail: Every source should land in one consistent playback shell

modules.title: Launch modules
modules.summary: Playback is the first delivery target. IPTV and SMB are upstream entry flows that should converge into that same player.
modules.player_detail: Build the shared player shell, transport controls and test media flow
modules.iptv_detail: Add playlists, channel groups and live-entry handoff into the player
modules.smb_detail: Add saved shares, file browsing and seekable handoff into the player

note.title: Delivery note
note.summary: The launcher can stay simple. The value of this project comes from stable playback, clean source handoff and reliable runtime diagnostics.

system.title: System
system.summary: Diagnostics and configuration stay here so the media entry modules can remain focused and predictable.
system.settings_detail: Runtime checks, source configuration, diagnostics and build metadata

player.title: Playback Test
player.subtitle: Shared player shell, transport controls and runtime state

checkpoints.1: Define player layout, overlays and playback state model
checkpoints.2: Add fixed desktop and Switch media entry points
checkpoints.3: Wire buffering, transport controls and exit flow

iptv.title: IPTV
iptv.subtitle: Live channels, playlist intake and grouped navigation

checkpoints.1: Add source profiles, sample playlists and refresh flow
checkpoints.2: Build grouped channel navigation with metadata rows
checkpoints.3: Pass live channel selection into the shared player activity

smb.title: SMB
smb.subtitle: Saved shares, browsing flow and seekable media access

checkpoints.1: Add saved servers, credentials and share targets
checkpoints.2: Validate directory listing, probing and seekable reads
checkpoints.3: Pass selected files into the shared player activity

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime checks, source config and diagnostics surface

checkpoints.1: Surface runtime target, build info and health checks
checkpoints.2: Reserve IPTV and SMB configuration sections
checkpoints.3: Prepare logging, storage and environment validation

placeholder.summary: This page already occupies a real product slot. The next step is replacing the shell with the smallest working flow that proves the module.

current_state.title: Current state
current_state.detail: Shell page is live and ready for implementation

path.title: Delivery path
path.summary: These checkpoints define the smallest useful path from shell page to working module.

settings_page.header_subtitle: Basic runtime preferences stored in switchbox.ini
settings_page.summary: Changes first stay on this page as a draft. After choosing a value and returning from the dropdown, press + to save and apply it. Press B to cancel and leave.

general.title: Basic Settings
general.summary: The current phase only exposes UI language. IPTV and SMB settings will be added here next.

apply.title: Apply changes
apply.detail_dirty: Press + to save to switchbox.ini and apply now

iptv.summary: Manage IPTV address entries here, including editing existing ones and creating new ones.
iptv.add_entry_detail: Create a new IPTV address profile

hints.title: This name will be shown in the IPTV source list

smb.summary: Manage SMB share entries here, including editing existing ones and creating new ones.
smb.add_entry_detail: Create a new SMB share profile

hints.title: This name will be shown in the SMB source list
